goals: Calculate future value of infrastructure investment fund to project growth over time
Compare multiple interest rate scenarios for long-term road project funding
Calculate present value of future federal funding for a highway project
Compare discount options for bulk equipment procurement

user_agent_config.personality: Pragmatic and detail-oriented, focused on fiscal responsibility and long-term infrastructure planning.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands infrastructure financing and basic financial concepts but does not know specific tool names or internal APIs.

end_condition: The user has completed all financial calculations for infrastructure planning and procurement decisions.
